get.summary: Get deal pipeline summary by stage
get.description:
Returns a summary of deals grouped by pipeline stages
(QUALIFICATION, PROPOSAL, NEGOTIATION, CLOSED_WON, CLOSED_LOST)
for the authenticated tenant.

get.description:

including leads, deals, contacts, and companies
for the authenticated tenant.

(NOTE, CALL, MEETING, TASK) for the authenticated tenant.

post.summary: Convert a lead into a contact and deal
post.description:
Converts a qualified lead into a Contact and Deal within a transaction-safe flow.
Updates the lead status to QUALIFIED, creates a deal, associates it with a contact,
and logs the action in audit logs.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Lead ID to convert

400.description: Lead already converted or invalid request

get.description:
Fetches all settings configured for the authenticated tenant.
Tenant is automatically resolved from the JWT token.

Fetches a single setting value for the authenticated tenant
using the provided setting key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Setting key

patch.description:
Updates the value of an existing setting for the authenticated tenant.
Settings are pre-created during tenant onboarding and cannot be created manually.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Setting key to update
